name: Italian Garden Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 cup red or yellow bell pepper, chopped
10 ounces frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Lightly oil a 9 x 13 inch baking dish.
3. Heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion, bell pepper, carrots, and garlic. Cook, stirring constantly for 3 minutes.
4. Add the remaining vegetables, except spinach. Sprinkle with dried basil, oregano, salt, and pepper. Cook, stirring frequently for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the spinach. Set aside 1 cup of the vegetable mixture.
6. Prepare cheese: In a medium bowl, combine half the mozzarella, ricotta, parmesan, and remaining vegetables. Mix well.
7. Assemble layers:
- Pour 1 cup of sauce into the bottom of the baking dish.
- Sprinkle with 1/3 of the noodles.
- Add 1/2 cup of sauce.
- Spoon half of the cheese mixture onto the sauce.
- Spread half of the vegetables evenly over the cheese.
- Continue with 1/2 cup of sauce, remaining noodles, and more vegetables.
8. Pour remaining sauce into the dish and sprinkle with reserved mozzarella. Bake covered for 40 minutes in the preheated oven.
9. Uncover and spoon any remaining sauce from the sides of the pan over the layers. Sprinkle with reserved mozzarella.
10. Bake uncovered for an additional 30 minutes.
11. Let stand 5 minutes before slicing.
